content:
leamas pushed 13 commits to branch debian/sid.

  • Add three upstream patches (9421bac0c15)
  • d/changelog: 5.8.10~beta1+dfsg test build (20cee0e9ea9)
  • patches: rebasing to 5.8.10, drop upstreamed patches (80cdb3b1f56)
  • d/patches: rebase, part 2 (c61eb52a9ae)
  • patches: new DISTRO_BUILD flag to mask some tests (d0288641f85)
  • d/build: Add DISTRO_BUILD cmake variable. (e8bf9219dc3)
  • d/opencpn.install: Update with new binaries (564a175ed52)
  • d/copyright: Update for new sources (b75f51f6a56)
  • Update upstream source from tag 'upstream/5.8.10_alpha1+dfsg' (9773f86b501)
  • d/changelog: Provisionary 5.9.1-beta1 entry (0f49b3364ac)
  • Update upstream source from tag 'upstream/5.9.1-beta1+dfsg' (5b647d46407)
  • d/patches: Rebase to new version (191753040e7)
  • d/opencpn-data.install: New directory basemap_shp (a8864468961)
